data.name: grdHopDong.BuiltInTextsData
data.value: <LocalizableData ID="LocalizableStrings" Collection="true"><GroupByBoxInfo>Kéo tiêu đề cột vào đây để nhóm theo cột</GroupByBoxInfo><EmptyGridInfo>Không có hợp đồng nào trong đơn vị này</EmptyGridInfo></LocalizableData>

data.name: grdHopDong_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="btnMenu"><ButtonDisplayMode>Always</ButtonDisplayMode><AllowDrag>False</AllowDrag><AllowRemove>False</AllowRemove><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><ButtonText>...</ButtonText><ButtonStyle>TextButton</ButtonStyle><DataMember>btnMenu</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><FilterEditType>NoEdit</FilterEditType><Key>btnMenu</Key><Position>1</Position><Width>21</Width></Column1><Column2 ID="MaHopDong"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Mã hợp đồng</Caption><DataMember>MaHopDong</DataMember><Key>MaHopDong</Key><Position>2</Position><Width>94</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="HoTen"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Họ và Tên</Caption><DataMember>HoTen</DataMember><Key>HoTen</Key><Position>3</Position><Width>202</Width></Column3><Column4 ID="ThonID"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Thôn</Caption><DataMember>ThonID</DataMember><EditType>MultiColumnDropDown</EditType><Key>ThonID</Key><Position>4</Position><DropDownIndex>0</DropDownIndex></Column4><Column5 ID="NgayKyHopDong"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Ngày Ký Hợp Đồng</Caption><DataMember>NgayKyHopDong</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgayKyHopDong</Key><Position>5</Position><RightToLeft>Yes</RightToLeft><Width>120</Width></Column5><Column6 ID="NgaySinh"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Ngày Sinh</Caption><DataMember>NgaySinh</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgaySinh</Key><Position>6</Position><RightToLeft>Yes</RightToLeft><Width>120</Width></Column6><Column7 ID="SoCMT"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Số CMT</Caption><DataMember>SoCMT</DataMember><Key>SoCMT</Key><Position>7</Position><RightToLeft>Yes</RightToLeft><Width>120</Width></Column7><Column8 ID="NgayCap"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Ngày Cấp</Caption><DataMember>NgayCap</DataMember><EditType>CalendarCombo</EditType><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy</FormatString><InputMask>00/00/0000</InputMask><Key>NgayCap</Key><Position>8</Position><RightToLeft>Yes</RightToLeft><Width>120</Width></Column8><Column9 ID="NoiCap"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>Nơi Cấp</Caption><DataMember>NoiCap</DataMember><Key>NoiCap</Key><Position>9</Position><Width>120</Width></Column9></Columns><SortKeys /><RowHeaders>True</RowHeaders><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><RowFormatStyle><BackColor>White</BackColor><BackColorGradient>White</BackColorGradient><BackColorAlphaMode>Opaque</BackColorAlphaMode><Font>Arial, 9.75pt</Font></RowFormatStyle><HeaderFormatStyle><FontBold>True</FontBold></HeaderFormatStyle><RowHeaderFormatStyle><FontBold>True</FontBold></RowHeaderFormatStyle><NewRowFormatStyle><BackColor>LightBlue</BackColor><Font>Arial, 9.75pt, style=Italic</Font><FontItalic>True</FontItalic></NewRowFormatStyle></RootTable><DropDowns Collection="true" ElementName="DropDown"><DropDown0 ID="Thon"><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="Ten"><Caption>Ten</Caption><DataMember>Ten</DataMember><Key>Ten</Key><Position>0</Position></Column0><Column1 ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><Key>ID</Key><Position>1</Position></Column1></Columns><GroupCondition /></RootTable><RowWithErrorsFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>RowWithErrorsFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></RowWithErrorsFormatStyle><LinkFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>LinkFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></LinkFormatStyle><CardCaptionFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>CardCaptionFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></CardCaptionFormatStyle><GroupByBoxFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupByBoxFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupByBoxFormatStyle><GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupByBoxInfoFormatStyle><GroupRowFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>GroupRowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></GroupRowFormatStyle><HeaderFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>HeaderFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></HeaderFormatStyle><PreviewRowFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>PreviewRowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></PreviewRowFormatStyle><RowFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>RowFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></RowFormatStyle><SelectedFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>SelectedFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></SelectedFormatStyle><SelectedInactiveFormatStyle><PredefinedStyle>SelectedInactiveFormatStyle</PredefinedStyle></SelectedInactiveFormatStyle><WatermarkImage data.name: grdMiaGiong_DesignTimeLayout.LayoutString
data.value: <GridEXLayoutData><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="ID"><AllowSize>False</AllowSize><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><EditType>NoEdit</EditType><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="Ma_PhieuNhap"><Caption>Phiếu nhập</Caption><DataMember>Ma_PhieuNhap</DataMember><Key>Ma_PhieuNhap</Key><Position>1</Position><Width>374</Width></Column1><Column2 ID="NgayLap"><Caption>Ngày lập</Caption><DataMember>NgayLap</DataMember><FormatString>dd/MM/yyyy HH:mm:ss</FormatString><Key>NgayLap</Key><Position>2</Position><Width>375</Width></Column2><Column3 ID="TongSoLuong"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Tổng số lượng</Caption><DataMember>TongSoLuong</DataMember><FormatString>### ###</FormatString><Key>TongSoLuong</Key><Position>3</Position><Width>453</Width><TotalFormatString>### ###</TotalFormatString></Column3><Column4 ID="TongTien"><AggregateFunction>Sum</AggregateFunction><Caption>Tổng thành tiền</Caption><DataMember>TongTien</DataMember><FormatString>### ###</FormatString><Key>TongTien</Key><Position>4</Position><Width>453</Width><TotalFormatString>### ###</TotalFormatString></Column4></Columns><SortKeys Collection="true" ElementName="SortKey"><SortKey0 ID="SortKey0"><ColIndex>1</ColIndex></SortKey0></SortKeys><GroupCondition /><RowHeight>25</RowHeight><RowFormatStyle><BackColor>White</BackColor><BackColorGradient>White</BackColorGradient><BackColorAlphaMode>Opaque</BackColorAlphaMode><Font>Arial, 9.75pt</Font></RowFormatStyle><HeaderFormatStyle><FontBold>True</FontBold></HeaderFormatStyle><NewRowFormatStyle><BackColor>LightBlue</BackColor><Font>Arial, 9.75pt, style=Italic</Font><FontItalic>True</FontItalic></NewRowFormatStyle></RootTable><DropDowns Collection="true" ElementName="DropDown"><DropDown0 ID="ddlThuaRuong"><RootTable><Columns Collection="true" ElementName="Column"><Column0 ID="XuDong"><Caption>Xứ đồng</Caption><DataMember>XuDong</DataMember><Key>XuDong</Key><Position>0</Position></Column0><Column1 ID="ID"><Caption>ID</Caption><DataMember>ID</DataMember><Key>ID</Key><Position>0</Position><Visible>False</Visible></Column0><Column1 ID="Ten"><Caption>Danh Mục Đầu
